inputs.mutable_prompt:
Both individuals keep their faces directed toward the camera without turning their heads, each extending one hand to form a heart shape. The camera remains stationary, with the background unchanged and the vehicles (cars, airplanes, or ships) behind them stationary.
Both individuals keep their faces directed toward the camera without turning their heads, and slowly embrace. The camera remains still, the background remains unchanged, and the vehicles (cars, airplanes, or ships) behind them are stationary.
Both individuals keep their faces directed toward the camera without turning their heads, each extending one hand to shake hands. The camera remains stationary, the background remains unchanged, and the vehicles (cars, airplanes, or ships) behind the people are stationary.
